prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body shot, a young man standing in the center of a pure white background, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors. The character is Lin Quantum, a male Quantum Reasoner. He has extremely high physical attractiveness, intelligence, and charisma. His hair is silver-white, styled neatly. He has a tall, slender, and athletic build. His face is exquisitely handsome with sharp, defined features. His eyes are a piercing, intelligent blue, conveying a calm, rational, and focused expression. His skin tone is fair. He wears a form-fitting, deep blue scientific research uniform with sleek, futuristic lines and subtle technological detailing. On his ear, he wears a delicate quantum sensor earring that glows faintly. His overall demeanor is cool, collected, and radiates an aura of supreme logical intellect, fitting for a hard sci-fi setting. no text, no symbols, no words., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
